content:
# Memory Summary

## Conversation Overview
User requested information about AI agent projects on GitHub and their technologies, then asked for a comprehensive document about AI API platforms supporting Python OpenAI SDK compatibility.

## Key Actions Completed
1. Searched GitHub for AI agent project technologies - found major frameworks: LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, Phidata
2. Created comprehensive documentation file: `D:\project\ShitBot\Docs\AI_API_Platforms_OpenAI_SDK_Compatible.md`

## User Interests Identified
- AI agent development frameworks
- OpenAI SDK compatibility across different platforms
- API platform comparison and integration

## Document Content Summary
Created detailed reference document covering:
- **Domestic platforms (7)**: DeepSeek, ZhipuAI (GLM), Kimi/Moonshot, Alibaba Qwen/DashScope, Baidu Qianfan, Tencent Hunyuan, Volcengine
- **International platforms (9)**: OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Groq, Together.ai, OpenRouter, Perplexity AI, Mistral AI, Cerebras, Anyscale
- Each platform includes: base_url, main models, features, code examples
- Quick switching guide with unified calling pattern
- Platform comparison table
- Best practices and FAQs

## Technical Details Captured
- All platforms use same OpenAI SDK pattern with different base_url configurations
- Key parameters: api_key, base_url, model name
- Environment variable management recommended for security
- Platform-specific features vary (Function Calling, Vision, Fine-tuning support differs)
